compiled_state.title: Refactor ticket-reducer.py::reduce_ticket (353 lines) into type-specific processors
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: Extract event-type processors (_process_create_event, _process_edit_event, etc.). Create TicketState dataclass. Reduce reduce_ticket to 50-70 line loop. AC: reduce_ticket <80 lines, all tests pass.

comments.body: AC amendment: Extracted type-specific processors must be placed as separate modules inside plugins/dso/scripts/ticket/ (created by prerequisite task 4387-30cb). Each processor type becomes its own .py file (e.g., ticket/process_create_event.py). Add re-export statements to plugins/dso/scripts/ticket/__init__.py. Original ticket-reducer.py becomes a thin dispatcher loop. Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket/__init__.py && ls $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket/*.py | grep -v __init__
comments.author: Test

comments.body: AC CORRECTION: The prerequisite task (4387-30cb) created scripts/ticket_reducer/ (not scripts/ticket/). Extracted processors must be placed in scripts/ticket_reducer/ not scripts/ticket/. Update AC verification to use ticket_reducer/ path: grep -q 'scripts/ticket_reducer/' .test-index
